app_description: A lightweight, flexible enrollment and communication system built for children's enrichment programs. Eliminates manual work, reduces enrollment friction, and increases conversions from lead to trial to paid enrollment. Supports offline payment methods (Zelle) and automates communication around the enrollment lifecycle.

user_roles.name: Admin / Center Manager
user_roles.description: Configures programs, manages leads, enrollments, payments, and communicates with parents. Has full access to all modules.

user_roles.name: Parent / Guardian
user_roles.description: Discovers programs, books trials, enrolls children, receives instructions and reminders. Each enrollment is per-child.

user_roles.name: Staff / Instructor
user_roles.description: Future role for attendance tracking and limited admin capabilities. Phase 2.

goals.description: Eliminate manual email and messaging work by 70%+
Reduce time spent per enrollment process
Achieve zero missed follow-ups with leads and enrolled parents
Provide parents a simple, mobile-friendly self-serve experience for discovery, trial booking, and enrollment
Systematize payment tracking for offline payment methods (Zelle) without requiring a payment gateway
Support multi-location operations in the future

non_functional_requirements.description: All parent-facing screens must be mobile-responsive and usable on phone screens without horizontal scrolling
non_functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Parent flows pass mobile usability testing on screens 375px wide and above

non_functional_requirements.description: Parent-facing UI must be simple and minimal with no unnecessary complexity
non_functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Trial booking and enrollment flows complete in 3 steps or fewer

non_functional_requirements.description: Role-based access control separating admin and parent capabilities
non_functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Parents cannot access admin routes; admin routes require authentication

non_functional_requirements.description: Secure storage of parent and child personal data
non_functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: PII is encrypted at rest and in transit; no PII exposed in URLs or logs

non_functional_requirements.description: System must support multiple locations and instructors
non_functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Data model supports location_id scoping; no hard-coded single-location assumptions

non_functional_requirements.description: Parent-facing pages must load quickly on mobile networks
non_functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Initial page load under 3 seconds on 3G connection

extra_data.franchise_context: Young Engineers franchise, Greater Round Rock area
extra_data.enrollment_model: One enrollment per child; parents with multiple children submit separate enrollments
extra_data.returning_parent_behavior: Recognized by email, skip lead capture, go directly to enrollment
notes: Question flow stopped: user requested draft mode after 2 questions.
TECH_PARKED: No specific technology stack mentioned in BRD; technology decisions deferred to implementation phase.
TECH_PARKED: Facebook Lead Forms integration method (webhook vs polling) to be determined during implementation.
TECH_PARKED: Email delivery service selection deferred to implementation phase.

global_experience_summary.navigation: Admin sidebar navigation; Parent top-nav with Programs, My Enrollments, Profile
global_experience_summary.layout: Consistent templates: list views, detail/edit forms, dashboard
global_experience_summary.note: See global_experience.json for full detail; this is a backward-compatible summary.
